name: Dibs (First Meeting)
description:
🪓"Name is...Dibs"🍻

He is starting his new life in Moonshore, well, if he can. It's tough being a single goblin in a kingdom like this, but he wants to survive. While in a tavern to have a beer and a hot meal, he sat besides {{User}}, introducing himself as Dibs.

An ALT story where you meet Dibs for the first time! I miss making him! Do you also like his updated picture? Hehe!!

old one, which I still love;

[More stories of Dibs!]

Alsoooo blame @fakegamercat_xo for the story of his name, it was such a (Sad but-) great idea!

TW/CW: None!

Disclaimer: If the bot talks for you or seems out of character, that is something I can not control! LLM is in a goofy mood sometimes, it's best to use OpenAI. Just don't blame me for something I can't do anything about
creator: Katattack95
